summary: Tested Data Safety Backup feature for AJPL Calculator. All 6 backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend Data Safety page loads with all UI components (export/import modals, mode selector, password validation). Admin dashboard has Data Safety sidebar link and quick action tile.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/backup/status returns backup status (admin only)
POST /api/admin/backup/export creates encrypted .dat file with AJPLDAT1 magic header
POST /api/admin/backup/export-excel creates valid .xlsx file
POST /api/admin/backup/import/preview decrypts and returns dry-run preview
POST /api/admin/backup/import/apply applies changes to database
GET /api/admin/backup/decode-instructions returns text file with Python script
Wrong password returns clear error 'Wrong password or corrupt data'
Short password (<6 chars) rejected with 400 error
Non-admin users rejected with 401 Unauthorized
Invalid token rejected with 401
Export->Import roundtrip preserves data structure
Merge mode upserts existing records by ID
Replace mode shows delete counts for transactional collections
Frontend Data Safety page loads at /admin/data-safety
Export Secure Backup button opens password modal
Import Backup button opens import modal with file picker and mode selector
Password validation disables button for <6 chars
Confirm password validation works
Data Safety sidebar link present in admin dashboard
Data Safety quick action tile present on admin dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Safety Backup feature fully tested. 6 endpoints: /api/admin/backup/status, /export, /export-excel, /import/preview, /import/apply, /decode-instructions. All admin-only. AES-256-CBC encryption with AJPLDAT1 magic header. Import has merge and replace_current_year_data modes. Frontend at /admin/data-safety with modals for export (password) and import (file+password+mode). OTP delivery is MOCKED - visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps.

endpoints_tested.returns: mode, manifest, collections with insert/update/delete counts

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
